summary.en: Passive listening on Reddit, Discord, Slack communities, Hacker News, Twitter, and niche industry forums where your target customer already hangs out. The cheapest discovery surface — text customers wrote unprompted is gold.
summary.zh: 在 Reddit / Discord / Slack 社区 / Hacker News / 微博 / 知乎 / 行业论坛等目标客户已经聚集的地方被动观察。最便宜的探索面 —— 客户没人提示时主动写的东西是金子。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Discovery / Discussion Forums

headline.en: A tiny community signal before a full platform.
headline.zh: 在做完整平台之前，先看小社区有没有信号。

story.en: Ryan Hoover first tested Product Hunt as a lightweight link-sharing group. He invited startup friends, announced it on Quibb, a technology-focused online community, and Twitter, then watched whether product people would contribute, click, discuss, and share. The community response showed a real appetite for a place to discover new products.
story.zh: Ryan Hoover 最初把 Product Hunt 做成一个轻量链接分享组。他邀请创业圈朋友参与，并在技术社区 Quibb 和 Twitter 上发布，观察产品人是否会贡献链接、点击、讨论和分享。社区反应显示，用户确实需要一个发现新产品的地方。

examples.source: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Product Hunt case study, pp. 166-167; Discussion Forums, pp. 134-137

text.en:
Replace this with one fragile organic-demand assumption.

e.g. [Target community] already discusses [problem/topic] with enough urgency that our solution angle can earn attention without paid promotion.
text.zh:
替换成一条最脆弱的自然需求假设。

例如：[目标社区] 已经高频且高紧迫度地讨论 [问题 / 主题]，我们的方案角度能在无付费推广下获得注意。

text.en:
We believe [target community] contains visible pull for [problem/topic].

To verify, we will analyze 50 relevant threads and make 5 value-adding posts/comments across 3 communities within 7 days.

And measure frequency, sentiment, engagement, direct replies, and invitations to continue the conversation.

We are right if ≥ 20 threads show acute pain and ≥ 10 qualified members engage with our contributions.
text.zh:
我们相信 [目标社区] 中已经存在对 [问题 / 主题] 的可见拉力。

为了验证，我们将 在 7 天内分析 50 条相关讨论，并在 3 个社区发布 / 回复 5 条有价值内容。

并测量 频次、情绪、互动、直接回复和继续对话邀请。

如果 ≥ 20 条讨论呈现强痛点，且 ≥ 10 位合格成员与我们的贡献互动 = 通过。

text.en:
Map communities: choose 3 places where the segment already asks for help: Reddit, Product Hunt, Indie Hackers, Discord, Slack, Facebook groups, or niche forums. Define keywords and exclusion terms.

Observe first: collect 50 threads from the last 90 days. Tag problem wording, workaround, emotion, requested alternatives, upvotes/comments, and member profile.

Participate: write 5 non-promotional contributions: answer a question, share a checklist, ask a clarifying question, or offer a lightweight resource. Track replies and invite 5 qualified members to short discovery calls.
text.zh:
定位社区：选择 3 个目标客群已经求助的地方：Reddit、Product Hunt、Indie Hackers、Discord、Slack、Facebook 群或垂直论坛。定义关键词和排除词。

先观察：收集最近 90 天的 50 条讨论。标注问题表达、绕行方案、情绪、请求的替代品、点赞 / 评论和成员画像。

再参与：写 5 条非推广贡献：回答问题、分享清单、追问细节或提供轻量资源。跟踪回复，并邀请 5 位合格成员进行短访谈。

text.en:
Pass: ≥ 20/50 threads show acute pain; ≥ 10 qualified engagements; ≥ 3 members agree to a follow-up call or waitlist.

Fail: discussion is mostly curiosity, vendor spam, or too broad to identify an ICP.

Inconclusive: one community is strong but others are weak; narrow to that community and rerun with 30 more threads.
text.zh:
通过：≥ 20/50 条讨论呈现强痛点；≥ 10 次合格互动；≥ 3 位成员同意后续访谈或加入候补。

失败：讨论主要是好奇、供应商广告，或过宽导致无法识别 ICP。

不清晰：一个社区信号强、其他弱；缩到强社区，再补 30 条讨论。

text.en:
Fill in after running.

Threads reviewed: __ ; Acute-pain threads: __ ; Qualified engagements: __ ; Follow-up opt-ins: __ .

Best community: __ . Repeated wording: __ . Verdict: validated / invalidated / inconclusive.
text.zh:
实验后填写。

已分析讨论：__；强痛点讨论：__；合格互动：__；后续同意数：__。

最佳社区：__。重复措辞：__。结论：已验证 / 已证伪 / 不清晰。

text.en:
Pick one based on the result.

• Persevere → invite engaged members into Customer Interviews or a Concierge pilot.
• Pivot → reposition around the words and subsegment that generated engagement.
• Kill → if the community shows no organic pull, do not rely on this as an early channel.
text.zh:
根据结果选一个。

• Persevere → 邀请互动成员进入客户访谈或 Concierge 试点。
• Pivot → 围绕产生互动的措辞和子客群重新定位。
• Kill → 如果社区没有自然拉力，不要把它当早期渠道。
